race.description: Cargill Cares Running Of The Bulls Pace (L)
race.comment: WICKED CONFESSION (1) settled handy the went to the front and kept finding to win for the second time in a row last start over 2190m at Mildura, getting there by 30 metres. Likely to get all the favours from this nice draw. Finds a tougher race but a big run is on the cards. SANCHEZ (3) produced a strong performance last start when he battled on bravely to just miss out over 1720m at Melton. Will enjoy a nice run from this favourable starting position. This looks a sterner test than last time but on his best form he is capable of another big performance. THE BRIDE (8) must be considered after she finished runner-up over 1690m at Kilmore four weeks ago. GOLDEN TRIBE (11) comes here following a seventh behind Hesitate at Group Three level three weeks ago over 1720m at Melton. A return to form is on the cards.
